fastsim_signal_summary.normalization_note: FastSim signal shard JSONs are full-production-style raw aggregates. Mass-point overlays in the preview are loaded from signal_cutflows.json and signal_yields_by_mass.json.

formula: DATA factor=1.0; MC normalization_factor = xsec_pb * lumi_pb / sumw retained from selected final/running checkpoint payloads only.
scope: PRELIMINARY partial merge over valid final shard JSONs plus terminal .json.running checkpoints at snapshot time; not a final production output.

signal_overlay_summary.missing_variable_note: Mass-point overlays are drawn only in cat7/SR for metpt, ht, njet, nb, and min_dphi; recoil_pt and nfj have no matching signal_cutflows histogram.

sms_policy: SMS FastSim mass-point overlays are drawn only in cat7/SR plots for mStop1000/mLSP1 and mStop1200/mLSP1 where signal_cutflows histograms exist; completed FastSim shard JSONs are summarized separately in fastsim_signal_partial_summary.json.
warnings: This is based on a live partial recovery snapshot and will change as more .running records are recovered.
Process composition may be biased until recovery and all shard promotion are complete.
Do not use this preview for Combine, final datacards, or physics conclusions.
